modules.sql: SELECT ifw_effective_date AS wire_date, COUNT(*) AS wire_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(SUM(amount) / COUNT(*), 2) AS avg_amount, ifw_effective_date FROM wire_transfers WHERE ifw_effective_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ifw_effective_date UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTHLY_TOTAL' AS wire_date, COUNT(*) AS wire_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(SUM(amount) / COUNT(*), 2) AS avg_amount, MAX(ifw_effective_date) AS ifw_effective_date FROM wire_transfers WHERE ifw_effective_date IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 AND strftime('%d', MAX(ifw_effective_date), '+1 day') = '01'
